message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontStyle italic
skinparam classBackgroundColor #F5F5F5
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam classHeaderFontColor black
skinparam classHeaderFontSize 14
skinparam classAttributeFontColor #8B0000
skinparam classMethodFontColor #00008B
skinparam classMethodFontStyle normal
skinparam classAttributeFontStyle normal
skinparam classAttributeUnderline false
skinparam classMethodUnderline false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0

class "A" as A1 <<Abstract>> {
    Iterable
    --
    __iter__
}

class "A" as A2 <<Abstract>> {
    Reversible
    --
    __reversed__
}

class "A" as A3 <<Abstract>> {
    Sequence
    --
    __getitem__
    __len__
    __contains__
    __iter__
    __reversed__
    index
    count
}

class "A" as A4 <<Abstract>> {
    MutableSequence
    --
    __getitem__
    __setitem__
    __delitem__
    __len__
    insert
    __contains__
    __iter__
    __reversed__
    index
    count
    append
    reverse
    extend
    pop
    remove
    __iadd__
}

class "A" as A5 <<Abstract>> {
    Sized
    --
    __len__
}

class "A" as A6 <<Abstract>> {
    Collection
    --
    __contains__
    __iter__
    __len__
}

class "A" as A7 <<Abstract>> {
    Container
    --
    __contains__
}

A1 <|-- A2
A1 <|-- A6
A2 <|-- A3
A3 <|-- A4
A5 <|-- A6
A6 <|-- A7
A6 <|-- A3

@enduml
